_note: T44 CI smoke fixture — mocked judge scores exact match (diff 0 all dims), see eval-smoke/smoke.test.ts

decision.title: Adopt a monorepo vs keep separate repos
decision.context: Two services share a growing amount of copy-pasted utility code and version drift between them causes recurring bugs.
decision.rationale: Monorepo removes the drift at the cost of a heavier CI pipeline; judged worth it given the bug history.
options_considered: Keep separate repos with a shared published package

forecasts.question: CI time increases by more than 50% within a month

outcome.summary: CI time roughly doubled; drift bugs stopped recurring.

failures.description: CI pipeline time doubled, slowing every PR

score_rationales.risk_comprehensiveness: CI cost was named but not sized: 3.
score_rationales.process_quality: Two real options, clear tradeoff, no kill criterion: 4.

expected_premortem_risks: CI pipeline slows down enough to hurt iteration speed
